regional_cost_note: Bathroom renovations in Auckland typically cost $9,000–$17,000 for a basic refresh, $20,000–$38,000 for a mid-range full reno, and $38,000–$85,000+ for premium work. Auckland rates are the highest in NZ, reflecting the city's cost of living and high demand. Waterproofing, tiling, and plumbing are the largest cost components — confirm all are included in any fixed-price quote.
